creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to lightside from comment #9)

This seems to be a separate issue, where elfutils provides a conflicting libelf.so to base.  In FreeBSD CURRENT, base libelf is on SONAME of libelf.so.2, perhaps avoiding the conflict at run time.  Still, it is not ideal that there are two libelf.sos.

I'm not sure if renaming elfutils' libelf, or just moving it to a non-default linker directory is a better approach.  Anyway, that is a separate bug.
